content.full_text:
State of California

Memorandum

To      :   File                                                                                              Date    :   July 11, 1978


From    :   FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
            Lee Rosenthal

Subject:    Section 86110

            The Legislature, in its attempt to agree on a
post Proposition 13 budget, continued in session until
July 5.  Section 86110 requires Section 86107 and Section
86109 reports to be filed during the month following
any month "during any part of which" the Legislature is
in session.  Therefore, although the Legislature only
met for 5 days in July, lobbyists, etc. are required to
file reports in August covering July.


LR:plh

sections.question_synthetic: When must lobbyists file reports under Sections 86107 and 86109 if the Legislature is in session for only part of a month?
sections.conclusion_synthetic: Lobbyists must file reports in the month following any month during which the Legislature is in session, even if only for part of that month. Since the Legislature met for 5 days in July 1978, reports covering July must be filed in August.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Internal memorandum format rather than formal advice letter; no explicit QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections, but contains clear legal interpretation and guidance; minimal formatting makes extraction moderately confident

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: When must lobbyists file reports under Sections 86107 and 86109 if the Legislature is in session for only part of a month?

CONCLUSION: Lobbyists must file reports in the month following any month during which the Legislature is in session, even if only for part of that month. Since the Legislature met for 5 days in July 1978, reports covering July must be filed in August.
embedding.first_500_words: State of California Memorandum To : File Date : July 11, 1978 From : FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION Lee Rosenthal Subject: Section 86110 The Legislature, in its attempt to agree on a post Proposition 13 budget, continued in session until July 5. Section 86110 requires Section 86107 and Section 86109 reports to be filed during the month following any month "during any part of which" the Legislature is in session. Therefore, although the Legislature only met for 5 days in July, lobbyists, etc. are required to file reports in August covering July. LR:plh
embedding.summary: FPPC memorandum clarifying that Section 86110 requires lobbyist reports to be filed in the month following any month in which the Legislature is in session, regardless of whether the session spans only part of that month.
